Viral Fever.medicine: Paracetamol 500mg every 6 hours if fever persists.
Viral Fever.advice: Take rest, drink fluids, and avoid cold food.
Viral Fever.precautions: Monitor temperature regularly and avoid self-medication.

Typhoid.medicine: Antibiotics prescribed by doctor, maintain hydration.
Typhoid.advice: Eat light food, drink boiled water.
Typhoid.precautions: Avoid outside food and maintain hygiene.

Dengue.medicine: Avoid aspirin, take paracetamol, stay hydrated.
Dengue.advice: Drink coconut water, rest well, monitor platelets.
